---
title: "Emily Georgiana Temple Frere"
---

## Emily Georgiana Temple Frere

**Dates:** (d.1915)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1865, 73)

### Biography

Third daughter of the Rev. Temple Frere (1781-1859); she was Augusta Frere’s first cousin.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
